title: anil oligophylla
intro: Anil oligophylla, also known as Anil or Pongamia pinnata, is a tropical tree native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia, its seeds and oil are used for various purposes. The medicinal properties of Anil oligophylla include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its rich oil content. The health benefits of Anil oligophylla include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve skin and hair health, and act as an antiseptic to treat wounds and infections. Anil oligophylla seeds are often used to prepare herbal preparations such as oil and powder, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
